title: Core Module Test Suite Expansion
description: Bring src/core/* test coverage up to 80% thresholds across all branches by adding unit tests for database.ts reset edge cases, hub.ts lifecycle, and storage.ts mutex contention scenarios. Uses Vitest with mocked Hyperbee instances.
summary:
## Summary: Core Module Test Suite Expansion

### Changes Implemented
- Added runtime.ts tests: `getCrypto wrapper` with Node and Bare environment coverage for createHash→update→digest chains
- Added curation.ts tests: 403/429 rate limit errors, generic 500 errors, network error without cache, file filtering, and fetchAndCacheSystems
- Created storage.test.ts: mountsFileExists() existence checks, loadMounts() JSON parsing and error handling, withMutex() concurrency serialization
- Added hub.test.ts: curation:seed and curation:search with no params (Invalid params edge case), database:reset handler

### Files Modified
- `src/core/__tests__/runtime.test.ts` - Added 2 new tests for getCrypto wrapper
- `src/core/__tests__/curation.test.ts` - Added 7 new tests for rate limit and error handling  
- `src/core/__tests__/storage.test.ts` - Created new file with 7 tests
- `src/core/__tests__/hub.test.ts` - Added 4 new tests for edge cases

### Notes for Developer
- All 182 tests pass
- All src/core/* files now have 80%+ branch coverage:
  - curation.ts: 92.3%
  - curator.ts: 97.22%
  - database.ts: 84.44%
  - hub.ts: 95.45%
  - runtime.ts: 100%
  - storage.ts: 100%
